content:
<act>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Collect observation evidence from docs/qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md for document-structure completion</objective>
<steps>1. Record plan with required fields and confidence bounds; 2. Collect observation evidence via fs.read or artifact.next; 3. Execute document-structure audit via doc.audit; 4. Build artifact scaffold using fs.batch_write for failed topology files; 5. Verify semantic consistency across all documentation artifacts</steps>
<checks>1. fs.read returns content from qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md; 2. doc.audit passes document-structure check; 3. fs.batch_write succeeds on artifact scaffold</checks>
<paths>docs/qwen-minecraft-windows-japan-united-states.md</paths>
<reason>Recovery phase requires structured plan before any tool mutation to ensure evidence completeness and prevent blocked-step failures from repeated graph.recover attempts.</reason>
</act>
